author: Aaron Beavers
name: Local RTX 4070 shared-depth RMS interface v0
blurb: Non-record local consumer-GPU track: 8 logical layers backed by 4 physical blocks, with extra pre-projection RMSNorm and phase-conditioned scales on 1x RTX 4070 Laptop GPU; timed stop at 471 steps and final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 1.65765109 under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
